title: Orbital Paper Nuke
description: This plugin (For Paper 1.21.1 servers) adds a crossbow that spawns a nuke.
body:
# **THE NUKE**

Ever wanted to explode your friends but a Orbital Strike Cannon is too cliché?

## **Introducting....**
**THE ORBITAL PAPER NUKE!**
This plugin for paper 1.21/1.21.1 adds a crafting recipe for a crossbow that when shot fires a linear strike of TNT directly on the arrow.

### **Destructive?**
Why would it be a nuke if it wasn't destructive?
When the first TNT lands it rapidly increases the radius of the TNT shot.
This makes a _small_ area COMPLETELY being destroyed by TNT.

**This mod is currently still in Beta and will soon be finished.**

It works by the code seeing where the arrow lands, then spawns TNT right above it and makes the TNT fly down with a lot of kinetic energy which causes a radius of around ~80 blocks to be completely destroyed and under fire.

The blast force goes further so when launching. Be sure to have enough distance!

Thank you for using Jits Nukes.
